name: Shrimp Versailles
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in margarine in a large skillet until tender.
2. Add shrimp and cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until pink. Remove shrimp with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Add cream cheese and milk to the skillet, stirring constantly until the cheese melts.
4. Stir in swiss cheese and wine. Add shrimp and red pepper. Cook just until heated.
5. Pour into a lightly greased casserole dish. Combine bread crumbs and melted margarine. Sprinkle over the casserole.
6. Broil for 1-2 minutes, until golden. Serve over hot cooked rice or pasta.
